calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: Caritas Management Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Soridee Barbosa; the property manager, also present.
Defendant: Michael McMahan, present in pop per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment upon Default, for restitiution and possession of the premises located at 422 Valencia St. #309, San Francisco.
Defendant agreed to $1360.00 of unpaid rent by mothly installment of $40.00, starting June 15th, and on the 15th of each month there after. Rent of $123.00 shall be made to the propery manager begining June 1st, Defendant shall comply with all rental agreement and rules, and waives all claims.
If defaulted, plaintiff may upon 25 hours notice to defendant move for entry of judgment.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled and trial vacted.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2005 Continued To May-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Continued To May-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar May-18-2005 Off Calendar

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCMAHAN

TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
